projectRoot.description: Project root when it cannot be inferred from the Nx project configuration.

dataSource.description: Path to the TypeORM data source file used for migrations.

moduleSystem.description: Override module-system detection used to select the TypeORM CLI runner.

outputPath.description: Directory where generated migrations will be placed.

pretty.description: Enable pretty printing for generated migrations.

driftCheck.description: Compatibility alias for TypeORM check mode (`--check`).

check.description: Run TypeORM in check mode (`--check`) and fail when schema drift is detected.

args.description: Additional CLI arguments passed through to the TypeORM command.
